schema_notes: Copy of the data/quals.json schema. Time format is seconds-as-string (e.g. '0:29.00', '2:25.00'). Course is LC or SC. Gender F/M. Files ending .example.json are never loaded — rename to <body>_<competition>.json after filling in REAL published times with their source PDF URL.

standards.source_url: REQUIRED — URL of the published qualifying-times PDF
standards.retrieved_at: REQUIRED — ISO date you transcribed the table
standards.notes: Transcribe exactly; omit unreadable cells and note them here.
